creator: ade@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Sep 06, 2010, at 03:18 , Kostik Belousov wrote:
> What was proposed by Philip is to install the required include file =
into
> the standard /usr/include, not to provide it with port. To (hopefully)
> reduce the flame, please test the following patch. If it works for =
you,
> I will merge it to RELENG_8 and RELENG_7 quickly.

Note that this patch is slightly incomplete.  You'll also need to update =
the mtree file for BSD.include.dist for the extra directory under dev/

-aDe
